name: codex-obsidian-mcp
description: Connect an MCP desktop client to your Obsidian vault via the Codex Obsidian MCP plugin.
long_description: Bridges MCP clients to the HTTP MCP server exposed by the Codex Obsidian MCP plugin running inside Obsidian. Open Obsidian first, enable the plugin in Settings, copy the URL and API key from the plugin's Settings tab, then paste them into the install prompt below.

url.title: Codex Obsidian MCP URL
url.description: URL of the MCP endpoint exposed by the Codex Obsidian MCP plugin. Find this in Obsidian Settings. Default is http://localhost:3001/mcp; use the https:// form if you enabled HTTPS in the plugin.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key shown in Obsidian → Settings → MCP. Leave blank only if you disabled authentication in the plugin (not recommended).
